Subject: Request for One-Week Extension of Contract Review Deadline

Dear [Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension of our current contract review deadline by one week. A few outstanding items on our side require additional time to ensure a thorough and careful review, and we want to make sure our response reflects the appropriate level of attention the agreement warrants.

We would be grateful if we could extend the deadline to [New Date], and we are happy to discuss any concerns this may raise on your end. Thank you very much for your understanding and flexibility — please let me know if that adjusted timeline works for you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
